state.topic: Surprisingly, you can prove the angle sum property of a triangle just by tearing off its corners and lining them up – no protractor needed! (class 9 triangles)
state.script: You can actually prove the angle sum property of a triangle just by tearing off its corners and lining them up, completely skipping the protractor. Draw any triangle you like on paper, then tear out each vertex carefully. As you place those three tips together along a straight ruler, something beautiful happens. The angles fit side by side without leaving any gaps to create a single straight line. Since every flat line measures exactly one hundred eighty degrees, your interior angles must share that exact total. This simple activity reveals why the rule holds firm. It proves that geometry itself arranges every set of corners so they always meet at one hundred eighty degrees, no matter how wide or sharp your shape becomes.
state.caption: Tear, align, and watch three random angles magically become a perfect straight line. #Class9Math #GeometryTricks #StudyShorts
